title: Stable Diffusion
abstract: Stable Diffusion handles image generation, video creation and 3D modeling from text descriptions. Built for creators who want results without the software learning curve. StabilityAI推出的文本到图像生成AI
abstract_zh: 别再为创意枯竭发愁啦！来试试 **Stable Diffusion** 吧！它能在几分钟内帮你生成各种概念图和插画，简直是写周报时的救星，调Bug时的灵丹妙药。再也不怕灵感断流了，快来加入我们的创作狂欢吧！
